info.name: Trackpro API
info.description:
Track-pro API (Figma): farmer, veterinarian, slaughterhouse, admin dashboards.

Import with `Trackpro.local.postman_environment.json`.

Roles: `farmer` | `doctor` | `slaughterhouse` | `admin`
• Livestock: /livestock • Visits: /veterinary-visits • AI: /ai/*
• Shared: /dashboard/me, /notifications, /map/markers

Base path: /api/v1. Health & Swagger stay at root. Run Sign Up + Login first; tests auto-set tokens and IDs.

request.description: Web cookie sessions only (CSRF_ENABLED=true). Sets csrf_token cookie; send csrfToken as X-CSRF-Token header.
Requires verified email for non-admin accounts.
403 if account is not role doctor.
Or use uid + reset from email link.
Figma Profile: fullName, userId, profilePictureUrl, unreadNotificationCount.
Doctor role only. Marks profile complete for directory listing.

body.raw:
{
  "clinicName": "Valley Veterinary Clinic",
  "licenseNumber": "VET-2024-001",
  "location": "Austin, TX",
  "specialties": [
    "cattle",
    "goat"
  ],
  "speciesTreated": [
    "cattle",
    "sheep",
    "goat"
  ],
  "bio": "Large animal practice serving central Texas."
}

request.description: Returns qrPayload + qrCodeDataUrl (base64 PNG) for Figma QR display.
Grouped by date with relativeTime and unreadCount.
Farmer or doctor summary based on JWT role.
status: pending_review | approved | declined | active | inactive
Cloudinary metadata for a delivery URL.
Multipart field `file`. Farmer → userFileUrls; doctor → doctorProfile.documentUrls. Query attachTo=none to skip DB.

exec: const url = j.url || j.publicUrl || (j.files && j.files[0] && j.files[0].url);
